title: heliotropium elongatum
intro: Heliotropium elongatum, also known as slender heliotrope, is a perennial herb native to the Americas and is characterized by its slender stems and clusters of small, blue flowers. The medicinal properties of Heliotropium elongatum include its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to alleviate respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, and its use as a natural remedy for digestive problems. Herbal preparations of Heliotropium elongatum can be found in teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used to soothe coughs and calm digestive issues.
